scripts.test:host-local: npm run build:host-local && vitest run packages/host-local/src
scripts.test:cli: npm run build:host-local && vitest run apps/cli/src
scripts.test:desktop: npm run build:host-local && vitest run apps/desktop/src
scripts.test: npm run test:core && npm run test:host-local && npm run test:cli && npm run test:desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:host-local && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.renderer.json --noEmit
scripts.verify:pre-push: npm run verify:structure && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run desktop:build
